{{Quote|Interdictor gravfield is down. All units: acknowledge and prepare to retreat on your marks.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Qat Chrystac''' was an Imperial offensive led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==The battle==
[[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] led fifteen [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ships to defend the system, but Grand Admiral Thrawn, using an [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]], quickly brought in additional reinforcements via an innovative maneuver later known as the [[Thrawn Pincer]].

General Bel Iblis invented the [[A-wing Slash/Legends|A-wing Slash]] during this battle in order to save the heavily-damaged [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] ''[[Orthavan]]'' from destruction. Despite the maneuver's execution, the Imperial fleet had already destroyed one-third of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] forces through superior tactics and firepower. Acknowledging their staggering defeat, Bel Iblis ordered his battle group to retreat to avoid any more losses. The Qat Chrystac system was successfully overtaken by Imperial forces.
